title: cerastium pumilum proles fallax
intro: Cerastium pumilum proles fallax, also known as the dwarf chickweed, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, it has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cerastium pumilum proles fallax is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
